User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account for the HopeEngineer Hub website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

registrationDate.description: Date and time the user registered.

lastLogin.description: Date and time of the user's last login.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and clarity for the HopeEngineer Hub application. User data is stored in a path-based structure under `/users/{userId}`. This provides straightforward ownership for private user data, simplifying security rules. The design explicitly avoids using `get()` calls in security rules by not creating dependencies on parent documents. This ensures atomic operations are possible, since all authorization is path-based.
